title: Retail Investors Are Selling Stocks to Raise Money for SpaceX
full_text: Retail investors are clearing the decks ahead of the SpaceX IPO.  For two straight days this week, ordinary investors dumped their single-stock holdings on a net basis, according to Vanda Research.  The moves suggests that mom-and-pop investors are amassing dry powder ahead of SpaceX's anticipated public debut tomorrow.
summary: Retail investors are clearing the decks ahead of the SpaceX IPO.
